title: Hayd Hayds
description: A modpack I've created for the Hayd Hayd friend group!
body:
The goal of this pack is to be a community focused, and slightly more than vanilla+. With Create, and a variety of block, furniture, and food mods included. There are also plenty of exploration focused mods, with YUNG's, End Remastered, the Aether, and much more! 

## **I highly  recommend looking at these QOL mods:**
### [Quark](https://quarkmod.net/#features)
### [Domestication Innovation](https://modrinth.com/mod/domestication-innovation/version/1.7.0)
For more information on the many QOL of mods included in the pack, [here's a doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OXFbSJ_TgD7VqUh7qWUm4piOwdc8zjWftOAcocnfGnA/edit?usp=sharing) I made!

---
